title: chrysanthemum brevilobum
intro: Chrysanthemum brevilobum, also known as the short-lobed chrysanthemum, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum brevilobum include reducing fever, alleviating headaches, and soothing respiratory issues, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for colds and flu. Chrysanthemum brevilobum can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine formulas, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed for various health benefits.
